summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly describes a mixed inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with live proof and maintainer follow-up; not closable as duplicate/superseded/low-signal in this mixed inventory shard.

Substantive active PR with proof, maintainer verification history, and unresolved review/author state; not safe to close or merge in this plan-only inventory job.
Small docs PR with author follow-up and active review state; keep independent rather than closing in a mixed inventory shard.
